purpose: Keep the sample-improvement workflow as one overall cycle while testing the original source in 10-episode windows, then advancing to later windows after each window is improved and verified.

chunk_unit.next_window_rule: After a window reaches verified or explicitly blocked status, advance to the next contiguous 10-episode window: 11-20, 21-30, and so on.

advance_only_after: element extraction completed for the current 10-episode window
agent recreation completed for that same window
original-reference evaluation completed or blocked with evidence
one improvement point queued or a no-change reason recorded
between-task system update gate applied selected changes
Context Plan and Evidence Pack recorded with source status
character and relationship carryover linked when applicable
human review evidence routed through Review Packet instead of direct policy mutation
